register.note: Semantic grammar holds without dilution — break-viewport keeps pink=error/bias, blue=prediction, orange=truth distinct (no all-red drain), and prose Terms pair hue+underline+weight, matching r2d3-trees/00's discipline.

hero.note: A hero would need a wide, ambient portrait of the threshold-cut scatter in truth/prediction hues above the masthead, with one explanatory on-load motion (the rule line easing into its cut).

assessment.note: The transfer item (transfer-hiring) is a third multiple-choice question with options, not an interaction or open prompt; the genuine interaction (break-bias) is an earlier experiment-task, not the transfer.

blocking: Add the specimen hero specified in DESIGN.md so the threshold-cut scatter (truth/prediction hues, no chrome) is visible in the opening viewport before the rail — this is the journey's first node and currently has the weakest opening in the cluster (§1d).
Compress the masthead/placard/rail stack so the See-it scatter clears the fold at 1440x900 instead of starting ~640px down.
Make the transfer item (transfer-hiring) an interaction or open prompt rather than a third MCQ.
